rules.pre_response: Before responding, verify if an installed Skill in .agents/skills/ is adequate for the task.
rules.pre_commit: Run Maintainer skill checks before every important commit.
rules.complex_task: Use Coordinator skill to decompose complex tasks before execution.
rules.db_convention: Database uses snake_case. Frontend interfaces MUST match.
rules.no_placeholders: Never output placeholder or incomplete logic.
rules.git_push: Always git push after each implementation.
